news.t: JPMorgan Asset Management Launches Fundamental Data Science ETF Suite on Nasdaq

holdings.infoBox: LCDS is an equity ETF with a total of 113 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.74%, Apple at 6.76%, Alphabet at 5.41%, Microsoft at 5.29%, and Amazon.com at 4.21%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan Fundamental Data Science Large Core ETF (LCDS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund actively selects components using a fundamental based approach, picking US large caps. LCDS was launched on Aug 7, 2024 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.

data.title: JPMorgan Asset Management Launches Fundamental Data Science ETF Suite on Nasdaq
data.text: Funds leverage advanced data insights NEW YORK , Aug. 8, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- J.P. Morgan Asset Management (JPMAM) today announced the launch of the JPMorgan Fundamental Data Science (FDS) Suite on th...
